calendar._note: Microsoft 365 authentication not completed — calendar data unavailable. Outlook Calendar Slack bot confirms today is Friday 24 April 2026 but returned no event details. Provide the OAuth callback URL to enable calendar access for future reports.

action_items.action: Unblock GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign — Ciara Carroll's ticket has been Blocked and In Product for 8 days (since 2026-04-16). Now in day 9 with no resolution. Come to any sync today with a concrete resolution or escalation path.

Investigate NEW blocker: GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management (Sanja Budic, In QA) — moved to Blocked on 2026-04-23. This is a new blocker not present in yesterday's report. Understand what is preventing QA sign-off and whether PM action is needed to unblock.

Check in on GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Highest priority, Ciara Carroll, In Progress) — scope changed after Claude design tool launched last Friday. Ciara confirmed in a DM thread with Cameron Bremner (2026-04-23 12:14 BST) that the Netlify deployment is restricted and work is ongoing. Align on revised timeline and deliverables.

Reply to Chloe Christie in Group DM (Mike / Chloe / Gab) re: stakeholder intake form — she asked to add a schema sub-section to the SEO field and a new page option with a dropdown for editable content blocks (2026-04-23 15:26 BST). Mike responded with a screenshot showing schema options — confirm if her feedback is addressed.

Reply to Gabriel Cornoiu in Group DM re: stakeholder intake form — he asked: (1) should there be an 'Other' option in the offer ordering dropdown? and (2) does 'new ordering structure required' mean a new OpList? (2026-04-23 15:16 BST). Clarify before form goes live.

Review and sign off GDCU-8801 Oplist Redesign on CA/FR Casino Page (Ciara Carroll, In Product) — sitting In Product since 2026-04-16 with no update (8 days). Parallel to GDCU-8619 — both need Mike's review to progress.

Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco, In Product) — moved to In Product on 2026-04-23 12:06. Fresh for Mike's review: mobile-first Betting Tips Hub with tip card components, Matrix widget integration, and operator offers module.

Confirm Jessica Dordevic's status today — no Slack activity visible since before her sick day on 2026-04-23. Check DM to confirm she's back and whether Tinder Widget designs (GDCU-8546) are progressing. She is now also assigned to GDCU-8879 (Genesis Brand Carousel, now In Progress) and GDCU-8694 (Image Carousel 500x290).

GDCU-8903 Sports Quiz Hub (Backlog) — Mike submitted a stakeholder intake form as a test run yesterday (2026-04-23 15:06 BST). Note: the ticket description states 'The UX ticket (design handoff) must be completed and approved before this ticket is actioned.' Create the UX pre-requisite ticket or validate scope alignment with Chloe and Gab.
